message:
fix: prevent user section from being clipped at intermediate navbar widths (#3191) (#3193)

At certain viewport widths (around 1024px), all navbar items become
visible simultaneously but the flex container lacks shrink protection,
causing the UserProfileDropdown to be squeezed invisible. Adding
shrink-0 to the left and right sections ensures they keep their natural
width, while min-w-0 on the search bar lets it compress gracefully.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
